response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and embedded systems experience, including C/C++ and Linux kernel knowledge from National Instruments, but lacks direct experience with embedded networking, security features (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), or Japanese language proficiency. Their background in high-performance systems and security-related projects (e.g., low-latency apps, AI-agent infrastructure) is relevant but not aligned with the embedded networking security focus. The mismatch in required skills and the lack of Japanese proficiency significantly reduces their fit.
strengths: Strong C/C++ and Linux kernel experience from embedded systems roles (National Instruments)
Proven track record in high-performance, low-latency systems (e.g., data integration at dunnhumby)
Diverse technical expertise across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with embedded networking, switch chip technologies, or security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X)
Lacks Japanese language proficiency (required for communication and documentation)
No clear evidence of work with chip-vendor SDKs or hardware control for embedded devices
